steps.title: Isolate the requested expression
steps.content: The question asks for the value of $4(x-5)$, which already appears in the equation. Subtract $8$ from both sides.

steps.title: Find the target value
steps.content:
After subtracting $8$, the remaining expression is the requested value.
$$68-8=4(x-5)$$
$$60=4(x-5)$$
The answer is C.
